description: Use this API to modify or add new load GIC shunt data to the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.8.0. ierr = gic_load(bus,ckt,realar)

parameters.name: bus
parameters.description: Base case bus number, must exist in the working case. (input; no default allowed).

realar.description: DC resistance in ohms/phase. R must be > 0. When R is not specified or R=0, fixed shunt is ignored in DC network. (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘r’.
Grounding DC resistance in ohms/phase. When RG is not specified or RG=0, fixed shunt is treated as solidly grounded when part of DC network. (0.0 by default), can also be specified with keyword ‘rg’.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
